title: IssueBean
description: A Jira issue with all fields and metadata.

key.description: The key of the issue (e.g., PROJ-123).

self.description: The URL of the issue in the REST API.

expand.description: The expand options applied to the issue.

renderedFields.description: HTML-rendered versions of the issue fields.

names.description: Field name mapping for the issue.

schema.description: JSON Schema for each field in the issue.
